believed_composition: Bornean (Pongo pygmaeus s.s.) + Sumatran (Pongo abelii) + possible captive hybrids, pooled
split_authority: Groves 2001 (Primate Taxonomy); elevation of P. abelii to species
note: Any pre-2001 'Pongo pygmaeus' species mean maps HERE, not to a modern species. A pooled mean over this concept cannot be un-averaged: composition of the underlying sample is usually unrecoverable. Individual specimens under this label may still be resolved (see specimen_crosswalk.resolved_taxon).
Bornean orangutan, narrow modern sense. Three subspecies (P. p. pygmaeus, morio, wurmbii) not tracked separately here.

Sumatran orangutan, elevated from subspecies Pongo pygmaeus abelii. Catalog rows recorded as 'Pongo pygmaeus / subspecies abeli' or '/ sumatra' (CAT-150, CAT-151) and MacLeod YN85-38 ('PONGO PYGMAEUS / ABELII') belong here at the specimen level.
